name_en: Loewe 🔥New Arrival🆕 Soft Smooth Calfskin and Jacquard Cubi Handbag
name_cn:
Loewe 🔥New Arrival🆕 Soft Smooth Calfskin and Jacquard Cubi Handbag
The Cubi crossbody bag is a spacious and soft bag that easily adapts to the body. Features a Loewe jacquard strap. Crossbody shoulder carry*adjustable strap*zipper closure*calfskin zipper pull*internal slip pocket*fits a 13-inch laptop*herringbone cotton canvas lining with Anagram embossing🌟
size:44*30*18cm
Model:062213
